_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of Post-Exploitation TTPs (e.g. data exfiltration, privilege escalation, operational prep of the environment).
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of AI application security risks, including prompt injection, jailbreaking, data exfiltration via LLM outputs, and model supply chain vulnerabilities.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-K-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-K-012 (SP, cosine: 0.479), DA-K-012 (DA, cosine: 0.475).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.0/10 (raw 0.505). Shared vocabulary: [data, exfiltration, knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [environment, escalation, exploitation, operational, post, prep] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, application, chain, injection, jailbreaking, llm] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.885 (P=0.888, R=0.883). Balanced P/R — the 14-word DCWF element and 20-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.0%, N:67.6%, C:32.3%). No dominant classification for "Knowledge of Post-Exploitation TTPs (e.g. data exfiltration, privilege escalatio" vs "Knowledge of AI application security risks, including prompt injection, jailbrea" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.501 ≈ STS 0.505 (gap 0.005). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [data, exfiltration, knowledge] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.9%. Shared tokens: [data, exfiltration, knowledge]. DCWF-only: [environment, escalation, exploitation, operational, post, prep]. WIDAI-only: [ai, application, chain, injection, jailbreaking, llm].
